name: Independence Day (India)
traditions: Flag hoisting at Red Fort by Prime Minister; patriotic speeches; kite flying; cultural programs; military displays.
historicalBackground: Independence Day marks August 15, 1947, when India gained independence from British colonial rule after nearly 200 years, through the efforts of Gandhi and others.
description: India's Independence Day, when the Prime Minister unfurls the flag at the Red Fort and a billion citizens celebrate freedom.
